subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast attained unto the recognition of God and turned thy face toward the Dawning-Place of Revelation, and in the Most Great Prison hast attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعرفان الله فائز شدی و بمشرق وحی توجه نمودی و در سجن اعظم بلقا که
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
